subject: (no subject)
body:
Dear Jeffrey
This will not be a happy new year for you. Thinking of you, I cannot sent my wishes to nobody without thinking of you. But, even in trouble time,the next year will be better than the last year and it is not an illusion  Future always looks good. In  2008 you will count your friends and my support will be yours more than ever.
  After South Thailand, we are now in Vietnam the boat is an old ferry renovated the Adam's way. I will send you pictures. 
Keep me updated on your situation that I will know when to come back to USA
Yo YO
Jean luc
Sent via BlackBerry from T-Mobile
body_html:
Dear Jeffrey
This will not be a happy new year for you. Thinking of you, I cannot sent my wishes to nobody without thinking of you. But, even in trouble time,the next year will be better than the last year and it is not an illusion Future always looks good. In 2008 you will count your friends and my support will be yours more than ever.
After South Thailand, we are now in Vietnam the boat is an old ferry renovated the Adam's way. I will send you pictures.
Keep me updated on your situation that I will know when to come back to USA
Yo YO
Jean luc
Sent via BlackBerry from T-Mobile
